messages.content:
你是 story facet 归类器。

输入是一组 story 概览。你的任务是为每个 story 分配 0 到多个 facet。

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 story_key
- 只能使用以下 facet，不能自造新 facet，也不能输出同义替代词：
- runway_series: 秀场发布、系列解读、造型看点、季节性走秀报道
- street_style: 街拍、场外造型、观众穿搭、城市风格观察
- trend_summary: 跨品牌或跨故事的趋势提炼、审美主题、风格信号总结
- brand_market: 品牌广告、产品发布、联名、组织与商业动作、市场层面动态
- facets 需要是稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- 如果 story 更像品牌动作、广告大片、产品发布、组织变动、商业合作，归到 brand_market
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "stories": [
    {
      "story_key": "...",
      "facets": ["..."]
    }
  ]
}

{"stories": [{"story_key": "0026a61d-0149-4f91-a064-602639bfbadb", "synopsis_zh": "アーカイヴブック「0 0 10」", "event_type": "product_launch", "source_names": ["Fashionsnap"]}, {"story_key": "025321a5-45b0-4e43-a656-a0578e6a3f8c", "synopsis_zh": "Henkel to Acquire Olaplex For $1.4 Billion", "event_type": "merger_acquisition", "source_names": ["BOF"]}, {"story_key": "027d325e-3122-4b7c-9c43-9bf08f3aec0c", "synopsis_zh": "For the \"The Beauty and the Bag\" campaign, Demna tapped Mert Alas and Marcus Piggott to shoot Kate Moss and Emily Ratajkowski in the Borsetto and Giglio handbag styles, not too much clothing, and yes, hundreds of dollars worth of smudged black eyeshadow.", "event_type": "brand_campaign_launch", "source_names": ["NYLON"]}, {"story_key": "02954c20-9a02-4a4f-869b-e05af65d2fff", "synopsis_zh": "This morning, the 2026 Vogue Vintage Market opened in downtown New York", "event_type": "fashion_event", "source_names": ["Vogue"]}, {"story_key": "03f4238e-68fd-47e6-9693-90994cf33e69", "synopsis_zh": "Awe Inspired, which released a collection with the film on March 26", "event_type": "brand_collaboration_launch", "source_names": ["Dazed"]}, {"story_key": "03fc456c-55fb-426b-bdc1-772110a67f15", "synopsis_zh": "Middleton enhanced the Prince of Wales of her coat with the wide-brimmed straw hat created by Juliette Botterill that the princess had to hold with her hand to keep it from blowing away in the wind", "event_type": "fashion_worn", "source_names": ["Vanity Fair"]}, {"story_key": "040e901f-ad60-4a65-822c-dbd51fe76bc0", "synopsis_zh": "Converse had seen a decline in sales, including a 28 percent drop in revenue in the first quarter, followed by another 31 percent drop in the second quarter", "event_type": "brand_financial_struggle", "source_names": ["Footwear News"]}, {"story_key": "0477cc9e-7d75-4f62-b1d3-871884289639", "synopsis_zh": "映像制作会社の東北新社は3月27日、グラフィックTシャツのグラニフを4月30日付で完全子会社化すると発表した", "event_type": "corporate_acquisition", "source_names": ["WWD Japan"]}, {"story_key": "05326e30-ad71-49e7-b0a2-cf5cd2ab9392", "synopsis_zh": "Colored and patterned fashion tights first hit their stride in the mod heyday of the 1960s, styled with swingy miniskirts and made iconic by the likes of Twiggy", "event_type": "historical_trend_revival", "source_names": ["Coveteur"]}, {"story_key": "0642d4ed-0c9c-4d00-94a8-33601de058fa", "synopsis_zh": "马踏新程，周游新境——CALZEDONIA携手中国区品牌代言人周雨彤演绎马年新春系列", "event_type": "campaign_release", "source_names": ["ELLE China"]}, {"story_key": "077d82ac-41c7-40a8-956e-b912b83e1666", "synopsis_zh": "Just three days before it was set to premiere, The Bachelorette—at a likely cost of tens of millions of dollars—was entirely cancelled", "event_type": "tv_show_cancellation", "source_names": ["Allure"]}, {"story_key": "07c5f086-9e8c-47e4-b8ec-9b055f787833", "synopsis_zh": "医学生（3月に卒業し、4月からは研修医）でありデザイナー／アーティストとして活動する陣内良飛による展示「イコ＝ル・メディカル・センタ＝（=QUAL M=DICAL C=NT=R）」が、3月20日から29日まで原宿のBLOCK HOUSEで開催中だ", "event_type": "exhibition_opening", "source_names": ["WWD Japan"]}, {"story_key": "080d55b0-32ae-44bb-ba6d-5484d27ac884", "synopsis_zh": "In \"Project Hail Mary\" — the sci-fi blockbuster starring Ryan Gosling, which debuted on March 19... Converse's classic Chuck 70 low-top shoes get enough screen time", "event_type": "product_placement", "source_names": ["Footwear News"]}, {"story_key": "086ed85c-146e-4750-96dc-2199b0baf101", "synopsis_zh": "2024年12月，Gentle Monster一紙訴狀將Blue Elephant告上法庭", "event_type": "legal_action_filed", "source_names": ["PopDaily Style"]}, {"story_key": "09efb113-1785-45fa-b260-533d000587ab", "synopsis_zh": "After graduating from Princeton in 2018, Edens entered into a period of self-discovery. Her days were spent pursuing a modeling career in Los Angeles", "event_type": "career_pivot", "source_names": ["Bustle"]}, {"story_key": "0a43d433-d2fe-4812-af62-b87b3ad92d09", "synopsis_zh": "In addition to her marital black comedy The Drama, which she’s currently promoting, Zendaya also has starring roles in Season 3 of Euphoria, Dune: Part 3, The Odyssey, and Spider-Man: Brand New Day", "event_type": "celebrity_project_announcement", "source_names": ["Elite Daily"]}, {"story_key": "0a748bce-ba40-49d1-a93d-3792af1cec9d", "synopsis_zh": "中国时尚大会「侠之大者」设计师联合发布落地海宁皮革城", "event_type": "brand_collaboration", "source_names": ["GQ China"]}, {"story_key": "0a8e30b3-168a-4dae-a1d9-953dbbb734e1", "synopsis_zh": "Korea Top Seller: Round Lab Birch Juice Moisturizing UVLock Spectrum 45 Sunscreen, $25", "event_type": "product_recommendation", "source_names": ["Allure"]}, {"story_key": "0ab2e535-87a4-48e2-b702-046374f34627", "synopsis_zh": "offering covetable vintage pieces sourced from eBay", "event_type": "brand_collaboration", "source_names": ["Vogue"]}, {"story_key": "0bf056b7-8b7e-4ec9-bc4d-f81bad299619", "synopsis_zh": "2026年1月16日，全球旅行生活方式领导者新秀丽（Samsonite）正式推出\"ZIVO系列\"旅行箱", "event_type": "product_launch", "source_names": ["ELLE China"]}, {"story_key": "0df38efe-a771-47b2-beb5-c0c60664b144", "synopsis_zh": "邀請品牌形象大使 Margot Robbie 擔任主角", "event_type": "celebrity_collaboration", "source_names": ["Marie Claire Taiwan"]}, {"story_key": "0f21334d-caea-4f81-a44a-dbe4e7c74f9c", "synopsis_zh": "This isn't the first time glittery sand has appeared inside a Swoosh, as Jordan brand previously did the same thing in 2023 with the Air Jordan 1 Mid and Air Jordan 1 Low", "event_type": "historical_reference", "source_names": ["Footwear News"]}, {"story_key": "0f30e8fb-e42a-48f0-b6ac-ef3fe385286a", "synopsis_zh": "According to The New York Times bestseller Once Upon a Time: The Captivating Life of Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy by Elizabeth Beller, her signature perfume was Abdul Kareem's Egyptian Musk Oil.", "event_type": "product_mention", "source_names": ["Elle"]}, {"story_key": "0f78435a-d378-457d-b4a6-997e4e3b255c", "synopsis_zh": "Converse and Noah were toasting to their collaborative sneakers", "event_type": "brand_collaboration_launch", "source_names": ["NYLON"]}, {"story_key": "10685725-3c80-4ac0-96c7-b7410f4597a5", "synopsis_zh": "Miley Cyrus出席2026年iHeartRadio音乐奖，身穿全黑皮革套装，获得创新者奖，造型由Hermés设计并搭配Marli珠宝", "event_type": "celebrity_award_ceremony_appearance", "source_names": ["Elle", "Vogue Fashion"]}, {"story_key": "11666ce3-a1a4-40f0-ac98-142972dd2d3d", "synopsis_zh": "We've only done one collaboration so far and it's been with The Coppola Hotels in Belize. The product turned out beautiful.", "event_type": "brand_collaboration", "source_names": ["Coveteur"]}, {"story_key": "11e1a41a-8ed3-4c59-9b75-1db81f4fae0a", "synopsis_zh": "自去年重磅推出 Aero 跑鞋家族以来，凭借出色的性能与脚感，迅速赢得了跑者喜爱", "event_type": "product_series_launch", "source_names": ["ELLE China"]}, {"story_key": "13ffe9cb-4a66-419b-8f89-2783702609a8", "synopsis_zh": "At the Los Angeles premiere, Zendaya recently rewore her white Vivienne Westwood dress from the 2015 Oscars as her 'something old'", "event_type": "celebrity_outfit_repeat", "source_names": ["Vogue Fashion"]}, {"story_key": "14d9f294-e9ae-46e0-93b6-ffca49ef9f35", "synopsis_zh": "Troye Sivan hosted an intimate evening of food, wine and music during Paris Fashion Week in collaboration with Penfolds", "event_type": "celebrity_hosted_event", "source_names": ["Dazed"]}, {"story_key": "152ebd5e-262b-47b9-8522-eeec00c41fce", "synopsis_zh": "Peter Copping 最近就职于Balenciaga主管高级定制系列，由他领导工坊进行高级定制系列的重启", "event_type": "previous_role_at_balenciaga", "source_names": ["GQ China"]}, {"story_key": "15aabd7b-f3c9-41c9-92f9-acc49d3131e7", "synopsis_zh": "After winning Pop Album of the Year for The Life of a Showgirl, Swift attributed the joy on her album to her experience on the Eras Tour — and Kelce, of course.", "event_type": "award_acceptance_speech_acknowledgment", "source_names": ["Bustle"]}, {"story_key": "164d36e8-6f44-4c3f-9e44-fa2e591dc282", "synopsis_zh": "Los modelos con tacón fino, kitten o de aguja apuestan por líneas limpias y una feminidad discreta", "event_type": "product_feature_detail", "source_names": ["Vogue España"]}, {"story_key": "1747d10b-1661-4e03-92a0-72de966be319", "synopsis_zh": "Swift also accepted the award for Artist of the Year, presented to her by Alysa Liu", "event_type": "award_acceptance_speech", "source_names": ["The Cut"]}, {"story_key": "18dbd63b-1fed-40d6-8f97-03697a2c0e12", "synopsis_zh": "TikTokers aren't the only ones chopping the tops of Timberland boots anymore", "event_type": "cultural_trend_reference", "source_names": ["Highsnobiety"]}, {"story_key": "18f68897-1eea-4948-9460-687127ac5954", "synopsis_zh": "el diseño, una creación custom de Alta Costura de Dior", "event_type": "custom_couture_debut", "source_names": ["Vogue España"]}, {"story_key": "1a825c6d-b27d-40a8-b670-07024b390f45", "synopsis_zh": "ウォーターフロントが展開する日傘ブランド「コカゲプラス（COKAGE＋）」から、高い遮熱性を持つ新作のキッズ用傘と長傘が登場した", "event_type": "product_launch", "source_names": ["Fashionsnap"]}, {"story_key": "1c3e626f-8eaa-436e-bc8a-74ccf22c0531", "synopsis_zh": "首席Bespoke定制总监William Adams此次也来到中国，亲自运用考究的定制技艺与深厚的制衣知识，为顾客打造专属定制佳作", "event_type": "bespoke_custom_service_event", "source_names": ["GQ China"]}, {"story_key": "1d3f5bf4-261b-4319-92c9-b92ee9980ad8", "synopsis_zh": "What was once the Naadam Essential $75 sweater has now become the Original Sweater after the brand increased the price to $98.", "event_type": "product_price_change", "source_names": ["PureWow Fashion"]}, {"story_key": "1dc21f17-e1db-465f-9765-07f4edfc2eaa", "synopsis_zh": "「サンディー リアン」の“KAWAII”を追求したスタイルは今季もブレることなく、会場の外でも「サンディ リアン」を体現する来場者たちで賑わった", "event_type": "brand_show_attendee_style", "source_names": ["WWD Japan"]}, {"story_key": "2047ff2c-5cbe-495f-b6b4-626bfc41c93e", "synopsis_zh": "AFAカテゴリーを中核であるアイウエアと同等もしくはそれ以上に拡大する狙いで", "event_type": "brand_expansion_strategy", "source_names": ["WWD Japan"]}]}
